intro: A straightforward agreement for visitors and clients. This page covers how our services work, what to expect, and our shared responsibilities.

sections.heading: Using this site
sections.body: By using this website or hiring Good Bones Web Inc., you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site or submit a project inquiry.

sections.heading: What we do
sections.body: We design and build websites, provide strategy guidance, and help rescue struggling sites. Each project is scoped individually. Before work begins, we agree in writing on deliverables, timeline, and cost.

sections.heading: Quotes and payment
sections.body:
• Quotes are valid for 14 days unless otherwise stated.
  • A deposit is usually required to begin work. The amount is specified in your project agreement.
  • Remaining payments are due according to the milestones or schedule in the agreement.
  • Late payments may delay project delivery.

sections.heading: Client responsibilities
sections.body:
To keep a project on track, clients agree to:

  • Provide content, branding assets, and feedback on time.
  • Review deliverables and approve or request revisions within the agreed timeframe.
  • Make sure they have the rights to anything they provide, such as photos, text, and logos.
  • Maintain their own accounts for third-party services unless we agree otherwise.

sections.heading: Revisions and scope changes
sections.body: Each project includes a set number of revision rounds, defined in the agreement. Additional revisions or new requests outside the original scope may take extra time and cost extra. We will always discuss any scope change with you before proceeding.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body:
After final payment, clients receive the right to use the final website and design deliverables for their business. We retain the right to show the work in our portfolio and marketing unless we agree otherwise in writing.

We do not claim ownership of any content, logos, trademarks, or other materials you already owned before the project.

sections.heading: Hosting and maintenance
sections.body: Unless your project agreement includes hosting or maintenance, those are your responsibility. We offer optional maintenance plans and are happy to recommend hosting providers we trust.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body:
Good Bones Web Inc. is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages related to the use of our services or website. Our total liability for any project is limited to the amount paid for that project.

We build every site with care, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability, perfect security, or specific business outcomes such as traffic or sales.

sections.heading: Cancellations and refunds
sections.body: If a project is cancelled after work has begun, the deposit is non-refundable. Any completed work beyond the deposit value will be billed proportionally. We will clearly communicate what has been completed at the time of cancellation.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms of Service occasionally. The latest version will always be available on this page with the updated date. Continued use of the site or our services means you accept the updated terms.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Alberta, Canada. Any disputes will be handled in Edmonton, Alberta.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: Questions about these terms? Get in touch.
